title: Transcript:2022 Pride event
wikitext:
{{Transcript|event}}
{{Transcript list|Gilbert|Aven|Wolf (2022 Pride event)|Alan (2022 Pride event)|Oscar|Sylvia|Marsha}}

==Before starting the event==
===Talking to Aven===
* '''Player:''' Hello!
* '''Aven:''' Hello there, [player name].
* '''Player:''' What are you doing here?
* '''Aven:''' I'm collecting some seeds!
* '''Player:''' Seeds? For what?
* '''Aven:''' Flowers! I'm a flower trader. I've been selling so many that I'm almost out of stock, so I'm looking around for some more.
* '''Player:''' Oh I see, well I hope you find some more!
* '''Aven:''' Thanks!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Wolf===
* '''Player:''' Hi!
* '''Wolf:''' Hey there, [player name].
* '''Player:''' What is going on here?
* '''Wolf:''' I'm selling flowers and flower seeds. I'm a travelling flower trader!
* '''Player:''' That's cool! Maybe I'll stop buy and get some later.
* '''Wolf:''' See you then!
* {{tact|end}}

==Starting out==
===Talking to Gilbert===
* '''Player:''' Hello, Gilbert!
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Player:''' What are you doing here?
* '''Gilbert:''' I'm just relaxing and enjoying the nature. I need a break!
* '''Player:''' A break? From what?
* '''Gilbert:''' Oh, you haven't heard? There is quite the dilemma going on in Misthalin right now.
* '''Gilbert:''' We, the inhabitants, have decided we'd like a bit more colour. It's very green!
* '''Gilbert:''' Green is nice, but what about red, orange, yellow, indigo, and violet. We need some more of those!
* '''Player:''' That sounds like a nice idea. The world is always a better place with a bit more colour!
* '''Gilbert:''' Exactly! We've had many ideas on how to do this, but none of them are suitable.
* '''Gilbert:''' Aggie suggested we paint all the roads different colours, but Doric said that would clash too much with the green grass.
* '''Gilbert:''' Abbot Langley suggested we dye the trees' leaves different colours, but Fred the Farmer said that would scare his sheep.
* '''Gilbert:''' Aris suggested they paint the wheat different shades of the rainbow, but the cook in Lumbridge said that would ruin the flavour of his baking.
* '''Gilbert:''' So you see... many ideas, but not many suitable ones!
* '''Player:''' Hmm... maybe I could help out? I'm pretty good at coming up with ideas!
* '''Gilbert:''' That would be super helpful, if you wouldn't mind?
* {{tselect|Start the 2022 Pride event?}}
* {{topt|I'd love to help!}}
** '''Player:''' I'd love to help!
** {{mes|You've started the {{Colour|#e11a1a|20}}{{Colour|#ff5f00|22}} {{Colour|#edf419|PR}}{{Colour|#208542|ID}}{{Colour|#3a06b3|E E}}{{Colour|#9240db|VE}}{{Colour|#e11a1a|NT}}!}}
** '''Gilbert:''' Amazing news!
** '''Gilbert:''' Okay, so, do you have any ideas?
** '''Player:''' Ah, well... now you ask, my mind is a bit blank. Let me think for a second.
** {{tbox|*pondering expression*}}
** '''Player:''' How about... we paint ourselves all the rainbow colours!
** '''Gilbert:''' Wouldn't that mess up all our clothes? And it'll wash away if it rains!
** '''Player:''' Alright, then, hmm... I'm out of ideas!
** '''Gilbert:''' I thought you said you were good at coming up with ideas?
** '''Player:''' I may have overestimated my idea-creating ability!
** '''Player:''' It's a shame we can't dye all the flowers in this field into a sunburst of colour.
** '''Gilbert:''' Actually, that was my idea! And why I'm here! I'm just not sure I can do it.
** '''Player:''' Oh, really? Why not, that would be great!
** '''Gilbert:''' I have the magic spell for it, but I need a flower seed of each colour to power the spell.
** '''Player:''' Can't we go and get a seed for each colour?
** '''Gilbert:''' I know there are two flower traders currently visiting the local area who may have the seeds we need.
** '''Gilbert:''' I would have gone to them myself but I don't really know where to go and I don't want someone to come and use this meadow for their own idea!
** '''Gilbert:''' So I've been waiting here, trying to think of another idea!
** '''Player:''' Well, I'm here now! Maybe I can go and get the seeds for you?
** '''Gilbert:''' Really? You'd do that for me?
** '''Player:''' Of course! I'm always happy to help out.
** '''Gilbert:''' Do you know what seeds to look for?
** '''Player:''' Ooh, no I don't, you better tell me!
** '''Gilbert:''' Okay, so we want six colours. Red, orange, yellow, green, indigo and violet. I've already got some {{Colour|#208542|Green Carnation}} seeds here that I found earlier.
** '''Player:''' Makes sense with all the green!
** '''Gilbert:''' Indeed! But for the other colours we need...
** '''Gilbert:''' Seeds for a {{Colour|#e11a1a|Legendary Red Rose}}, a {{Colour|#ff5f00|Gorgeous Orange Lily}}, a {{Colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}}, a {{Colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}}, and a {{Colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}}.
** '''Player:''' Okay, got those noted down.
** '''Gilbert:''' Excellent! Well, the first flower trader is apparently 'At the place where you turn essence into the power of the body', whatever that means.
** '''Player:''' Why in Gielinor did they explain their location like that?! Just saying something like 'Lumbridge Castle courtyard' would have been easier.
** '''Gilbert:''' I heard of their location from a friend, who heard from his friend, who heard from her friend, who told him what they'd heard from their sister who heard from a passerby.
** '''Gilbert:''' So it may not be an entirely accurate recount of the original explanation.
** '''Player:''' I see, and the second trader?
** '''Gilbert:''' The second flower trader is... hmm, I can't remember actually. I'll remember by the time you're back from the first one!
** '''Player:''' Okay, well, I think I have enough to go on anyway! I shall go and look for these seeds.
** '''Gilbert:''' Thank you. Good luck!
** {{mes|color=#9240db|The first trader can be found 'At the place where you turn essence into the power of the body'.}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Actually, I'm a bit busy right now.}}
** '''Player:''' Actually, I'm a bit busy right now.
** '''Gilbert:''' Oh, that's a shame. Come back if you can free up some time. I'd still welcome some help!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Gilbert again if the player said they were busy===
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Gilbert:''' Are you free to help me now?
* {{tselect|Start the 2022 Pride event?}}
* {{topt|Yes, I'm free to help now!}}
** '''Player:''' Yes, I'm free to help now!
** '''Gilbert:''' Amazing news!
** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|I'm still a bit busy right now.}}
** '''Player:''' I'm still a bit busy right now.
** '''Gilbert:''' Oh, okay. Well as before, come back if you can free up some time. I'd still welcome some help!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Gilbert after offering to help===
* '''Player:''' Hello, Gilbert!
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Gilbert:''' Okay, so, do you have any ideas for what to do?
* '''Player:''' Ah, well... now you ask, my mind is a bit blank. Let me think for a second.
* {{tact|above}}

===Talking to Gilbert after noting down the flowers===
* '''Player:''' Hello, Gilbert!
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Gilbert:''' How is the flower hunt going?
* '''Player:''' I haven't found any yet!
* '''Gilbert:''' Oh, well, keep looking! Remember that the first flower trader is 'At the place where you turn essence into the power of the body'.
* '''Gilbert:''' We need seeds for a {{colour|#e11a1a|Legendary Red Rose}}, a {{colour|#ff5f00|Gorgeous Orange Lily}}, a {{colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}}, a {{colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}}, and a {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}}.
* '''Player:''' Thank you, I'll go and get them now!
* {{tact|end}}

==Red and Orange==
===Talking to Aven===
* '''Player:''' Hello!
* '''Aven:''' Hello there, [player name].
* '''Player:''' Are you the flower trader?
* '''Aven:''' I am a flower trader, but not the only one! Are you looking for any flowers in particular?
* '''Player:''' I am! Well, flower seeds. Do you sell seeds?
* '''Aven:''' Of course! I mostly sell seeds as they tend to make it back home in one piece. Flowers themselves are quite delicate.
* '''Aven:''' What seeds are you after?
* '''Player:''' Quite a few actually! I'm looking for seeds for a {{Colour|#e11a1a|Legendary Red Rose}}, a {{Colour|#ff5f00|Gorgeous Orange Lily}}, a {{Colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}}, a {{Colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}}, and a {{Colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}}.
* '''Aven:''' Oh my, that is a lot! If you don't mind me asking, what are they all for?
* '''Player:''' I'm trying to help bring some more colour to Misthalin!
* '''Aven:''' That sounds like a wonderful idea!
* '''Aven:''' I sadly don't have all of the seeds you're after, as my stocks are running quite low, but I do have seeds for a {{Colour|#e11a1a|Legendary Red Rose}} and a {{Colour|#ff5f00|Gorgeous Orange Lily}}.
* '''Aven:''' Is that okay?
* '''Player:''' That's great. It's a good start!
* '''Aven:''' I am glad to hear it. Well, here you go!
* {{tcond|If the player does not have enough inventory space:}}
** '''Aven:''' Oh dear, you don't have enough space to carry the seeds. Come back when you have two spaces free.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tbox|pic=Legendary red rose seed detail.png|pic2=Gorgeous orange lily seed detail.png|Aven gives you both a {{Colour|#e11a1a|Legendary Red Rose}} seed and a {{Colour|#ff5f00|Gorgeous Orange Lily}} seed.}}
* '''Player:''' For free?
* '''Aven:''' Yes! You said you're trying to bring some more colour to Misthalin. That is a cause I can get behind.
* '''Player:''' Thank you very much!
* '''Player:''' Where do you find all these rare seeds? Are they gifts from all your suitors?
* '''Aven:''' No! I forage for and grow them all myself! I would never accept such gifts, giving people hope of things that could never be...
* '''Aven:''' I'm much more of a plant person than a people person!
* '''Aven:''' As for the remaining seeds, maybe you could visit another trader. I know there was one by a bank, but I can't remember where that bank was.
* '''Player:''' Hmm, I will have a look around. Again, thank you very much!
* {{tbox|Aven turns away and starts looking for more flower seeds.}}
* '''Player:''' I should return to Gilbert and show him what I've found.
* {{mes|color=#9240db|I should return to Gilbert and show him what I've found.}}
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Aven again before getting the seeds====
* '''Player:''' Hello!
* '''Aven:''' Hello there, [player name].
* '''Aven:''' Do you have space for the seeds now?
* {{tcond|If the player does not have space:}}
** '''Player:''' Not yet.
** '''Aven:''' Oh okay, come back when you have two spaces free.
** {{tact|end}}
* '''Player:''' I do!
* '''Aven:''' Here you go.
* {{tbox|pic=Legendary red rose seed detail.png|pic2=Gorgeous orange lily seed detail.png|Aven gives you both a {{colour|#e11a1a|Legendary Red Rose}} seed and a {{colour|#ff5f00|Gorgeous Orange Lily}} seed.}}
* {{tact|above}}

====Talking to Aven after losing the seeds====
* '''Player:''' Hello!
* '''Aven:''' Hello there, [player name].
* {{tcond|If the player lost both seeds:}}
** '''Player:''' I've lost both of the seeds you gave me!
** '''Aven:''' Oh dear! Well luckily for you I have some spares. Here you go.
** {{tcond|If the player does not have inventory space:}}
*** '''Aven:''' Oh, you don't have enough space to hold them. Come back to me when you have two spaces free.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tbox|pic=Legendary red rose seed detail.png|pic2=Gorgeous orange lily seed detail.png|Aven hands you another {{colour|#e11a1a|Legendary Red Rose}} seed and another {{colour|#ff5f00|Gorgeous Orange Lily}} seed.}}
** '''Aven:''' Try not to lose these ones!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player lost one seed:}}
** '''Player:''' I've lost one of the seeds you gave me!
** '''Aven:''' Oh dear! Well luckily for you I have some spares. Here you go.
** {{tcond|If the player does not have space for the seed:}}
*** '''Aven:''' Oh, you don't have enough space to hold it. Come back to me when you have a space free.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tcond|If the player lost the Legendary Red Rose seed:}}
*** {{tbox|pic=Legendary red rose seed detail.png|Aven hands you another {{colour|#e11a1a|Legendary Red Rose}} seed.}}
*** '''Aven:''' Try not to lose this one!
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tcond|If the player lost the Gorgeous orange lily seed:}}
*** {{tbox|pic=Gorgeous orange lily seed detail.png|Aven hands you another {{colour|#ff5f00|Gorgeous Orange Lily}} seed.}}
*** '''Aven:''' Try not to lose this one!
*** {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Aven while holding the seeds or after the event====
* '''Player:''' Hello!
* '''Aven:''' Hello there, [player name].
* '''Player:''' What are you up to now?
* '''Aven:''' I'm collecting some more seeds! I'm running low on stocks.
* '''Player:''' I hope you find some more!
* '''Aven:''' Thank you!
* {{tact|end}}

===Returning to Gilbert=== {{^|Note: Not necessary to have the seeds in inventory.}}
* '''Player:''' Hello, Gilbert!
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Player:''' I have two of the seeds now! Red and orange.
* '''Gilbert:''' That is great! We just need three more and then we're ready.
* '''Player:''' Aven the flower trader sadly didn't have any of the others left in stock, so we'll have to go to the second trader you mentioned earlier for the rest.
* '''Player:''' Have you remembered where they're located now?
* '''Gilbert:''' Mostly...
* '''Player:''' Mostly?
* '''Gilbert:''' I remembered that they're somewhere in Varrock!
* '''Player:''' That's it? Varrock is huge, I'll be looking for ages!
* '''Gilbert:''' I know, sorry. If only there was something more to go on.
* '''Player:''' Oh, I do have something! Aven said there is another trader near a bank, maybe it's a bank in Varrock?
* '''Gilbert:''' Yes! That's the one! They're at the Varrock West Bank.
* '''Player:''' That's not too far either, I'll head there now.
* '''Gilbert:''' Remember, we now only need seeds for a {{Colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}}, a {{Colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}}, and a {{Colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}}.
* '''Player:''' Noted! I will be back here soon with the rest of the seeds.
* {{mes|color=#9240db|The second trader can be found at the Varrock West Bank.}}
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Gilbert after noting down the yellow, indigo, and violet seeds====
* '''Player:''' Hello, Gilbert!
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Gilbert:''' How is the search for the last seeds going?
* '''Player:''' I haven't found them yet!
* '''Gilbert:''' Oh, keep looking! Remember that this trader is at the Varrock West Bank.
* '''Gilbert:''' We need seeds for a {{colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}}, a {{colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}}, and a {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}}.
* '''Player:''' Thank you, I'll go and get them now!
* {{tact|end}}

==Yellow and Indigo==
===Talking to Wolf===
* '''Player:''' Hi!
* '''Wolf:''' Hey there, [player name].
* '''Player:''' Are you a flower trader?
* '''Wolf:''' I am, is there anything you're after in particular?
* '''Player:''' Yes actually, I'm looking for seeds for a {{Colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}}, a {{Colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}}, and a {{Colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}}.
* '''Wolf:''' I think I can help you with those!
* '''Wolf:''' Those colours sound familiar. Have you by any chance already got seeds for red, orange and green flowers?
* '''Player:''' I do! How did you know?
* '''Wolf:''' We flower-traders talk, you know!
* '''Wolf:''' Anyway, here are your seeds. You can have them, gratis. I don't charge for a good cause!
* '''Wolf:''' Oh wait, I don't have any {{Colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seeds. Someone bought the last of them from me earlier.
* '''Wolf:''' Here are the other two.
* {{tcond|If the player does not have enough inventory space:}}
** '''Wolf:''' Oh dear, you don't have enough space to carry the seeds. Come back when you have two spaces free.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tbox|pic=Beautiful yellow pansy seed detail.png|pic2=Tenacious indigo iris seed detail.png|Wolf gives you both a {{Colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}} seed and a {{Colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}} seed.}}
* '''Player:''' Thank you!
* '''Wolf:''' Sorry about not having any {{Colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seeds. Although you may be able to ask the buyer if they have any spare, they bought every last one!
* '''Wolf:''' They were bought by someone who went off to the Blue Moon Inn, so you should be able to find them there!
* '''Player:''' Thanks, I will go and see if they have any spare.
* '''Wolf:''' Good luck!
* {{mes|color=#9240db|The person who bought all the Quality Violet Tulip seeds can be found at the Blue Moon Inn.}}
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Wolf again before getting the seeds====
* '''Player:''' Hi!
* '''Wolf:''' Hey there, [player name].
* '''Wolf:''' Do you have space for the seeds now?
* {{tcond|If the player does not have space for the seeds:}}
** '''Player:''' Not yet.
** '''Wolf:''' Oh okay, come back when you have two spaces free.
** {{tact|end}}
* '''Player:''' I do!
* '''Wolf:''' Here you go.
* {{tbox|pic=Beautiful yellow pansy seed detail.png|pic2=Tenacious indigo iris seed detail.png|Wolf gives you both a {{colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}} seed and a {{colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}} seed.}}
* {{tact|above}}

====Talking to Wolf after losing the seeds====
* '''Player:''' Hi!
* '''Wolf:''' Hey there, [player name].
* {{tcond|If the player lost both seeds:}}
** '''Player:''' I've lost both of the seeds you gave me!
** '''Wolf:''' Oops! Well I have some spares of the {{colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}} and {{colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}} seeds that I gave you, here you go.
** {{tcond|If the player does not have enough inventory space:}}
*** '''Wolf:''' Oh, you don't have enough space to hold them. Come back to me when you have two spaces free.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tbox|pic=Beautiful yellow pansy seed detail.png|pic2=Tenacious indigo iris seed detail.png|Wolf hands you another {{colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}} seed and another {{colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}} seed.}}
** '''Wolf:''' Try not to lose these ones!
* {{tcond|If the player lost one seed:}}
** '''Player:''' I've lost one of the seeds you gave me!
** '''Wolf:''' Oh dear! Well luckily for you I have some spares. Here you go.
** {{tcond|If the player does not have enough inventory space:}}
*** '''Wolf:''' Oh, you don't have enough space to hold it. Come back to me when you have a space free.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tcond|If the player lost the Beautiful yellow pansy seed:}}
*** {{tbox|pic=Beautiful yellow pansy seed detail.png|Wolf hands you another {{colour|#edf419|Beautiful Yellow Pansy}} seed.}}
*** '''Wolf:''' Try not to lose this one!
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{tcond|If the player lost the Tenacious indigo iris seed:}}
*** {{tbox|pic=Tenacious indigo iris seed detail.png|Wolf hands you another {{colour|#3a06b3|Tenacious Indigo Iris}} seed.}}
*** '''Wolf:''' Try not to lose this one!
*** {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Wolf again while still holding the seeds====
* '''Player:''' Hi!
* '''Wolf:''' Hey there, [player name].
* '''Player:''' What are you up to now?
* '''Wolf:''' I'm still selling my flowers and seeds! Did you find your last seed?
* '''Player:''' Not yet, no.
* '''Wolf:''' I'm sure you'll get one soon. Remember the person who bought the seeds went off to the Blue Moon Inn.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Gilbert after getting the yellow and indigo seeds=== {{^|Note: The player does not need to be holding the seeds.}}
* '''Player:''' Hello, Gilbert!
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Player:''' I've collected four of the five seeds from the traders.
* '''Player:''' Somebody else completely bought out the stock of the last seed we need! But I'm going to give them a visit and see if they have any spare.
* '''Gilbert:''' Sounds like a good plan, I hope they have some spare.
* {{tact|end}}

==Violet==

===Talking to Sylvia, Marsha, Oscar, or Alan before reaching the correct part of the event===
* {{tbox|The two of them are deep in conversation. You decide not to disturb them.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===If the player needs to talk to Sylvia or Marsha first===
====Talking to Sylvia or Marsha====
* '''Sylvia:''' What's taking them so long?
* '''Marsha:''' Go easy on them! It's not easy to do something like this, especially when they've been friends as long as they have.
* '''Sylvia:''' I know, I know. It's just all this waiting... It's making me nervous.
* '''Player:''' Hey there. I'm looking for someone who bought some {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seeds.
* '''Sylvia:''' Oh, that's us! Why do you ask?
* '''Player:''' The trader has run out and I could really use some. I'm hoping to use them to bring some more colour to Misthalin!
* '''Marsha:''' Well we definitely need more colour around here. Thing is, those seeds are quite important to us.
* '''Player:''' How so?
* '''Sylvia:''' See our two friends over there? They have just a little bit of a massive crush on each other. Problem is, neither of them are brave enough to ask the other out.
* '''Marsha:''' We thought some nice flowers might help things along a bit. They've both loved {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulips}} ever since they worked a stint on the same farm together.
* '''Marsha:''' We got them the seeds so that they could plant them together, thinking maybe the shared activity would nudge them into taking the first step!
* '''Sylvia:''' Thing is, it's hard to tell if it's working so far. They've been awkwardly standing there for quite a while now.
* '''Marsha:''' To be fair, it was pretty awkward when you asked me out as well.
* '''Sylvia:''' Was it? I thought it went really well!
* '''Marsha:''' You got so nervous you slipped and fell in the Lum. Some random passerby had to fish you out again!
* '''Sylvia:''' Oh yeah! That was a good day.
* '''Marsha:''' You know, speaking of random passersby, that gives me an idea. Considering we haven't had much luck helping our friends find some courage, perhaps you could try?
* '''Sylvia:''' Good idea! We'll give you one of these seeds in return of course.
* '''Player:''' But I'm just a stranger to them. What makes you think I can help?
* '''Marsha:''' Don't underestimate how meaningful a kind act from a random stranger can be.
* '''Player:''' Alright, I'll give it a go.
* '''Sylvia:''' Good luck!
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Sylvia or Marsha again====
* '''Marsha:''' Any luck?
* '''Player:''' Not yet.
* '''Sylvia:''' Please hurry! The suspense is killing me!
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Alan or Oscar====
* '''Alan:''' So... the... er... flowers?
* '''Oscar:''' Yeah... I like the... colour?
* {{tbox|The two of them awkwardly stand in silence.}}
* '''Player:''' Sometimes it's hard to know what to say, right?
* '''Oscar:''' Oh... who are you?
* '''Player:''' Just a friend.
* '''Alan:''' But we've never met you before.
* '''Player:''' Well then I guess that makes me your newest friend!
* '''Oscar:''' Okay...
* '''Player:''' It seems you both have something you want to say to the other, but neither of you knows how to say it.
* '''Alan:''' It's just finding the right words... It's... hard.
* '''Player:''' Let's be honest, I think you both know how the other feels already, so maybe the words don't matter.
* '''Oscar:''' What do you mean?
* '''Player:''' There are no right words for something like this! It's always going to be awkward, so embrace that awkwardness!
* '''Oscar:''' Huh... I suppose you're right.
* '''Alan:''' Then I guess we just... give things a go?
* '''Oscar:''' Yeah! Let's do it!
* '''Player:''' I think my work here is done. I'll leave you both to it.
* '''Alan:''' Thanks for the advice!
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Alan or Oscar again====
* '''Alan:''' Hey!
* '''Oscar:''' Thank you so much for helping us.
* '''Player:''' It's not a problem.
* '''Alan:''' See you around.
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Sylvia or Marsha after talking to Oscar and Alan====
* '''Marsha:''' You're back!
* '''Sylvia:''' Well?
* '''Player:''' I think it's good news for your friends.
* '''Marsha:''' Yay! I knew they could do it!
* '''Sylvia:''' Thank you so much. This world needs a few more people like you.
* '''Player:''' It was nothing. I'm just happy to have helped.
* {{tcond|If the player does not have inventory space:}}
** '''Sylvia:''' As promised, I have your {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seed. Just come back once you have room for it.
** {{tact|end}}
* '''Sylvia:''' As promised, here's your {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seed.
* {{tbox|pic=Quality violet tulip seed detail.png|You've been given a {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seed.}}
* '''Player:''' Thanks!
* {{mes|color=#9240db|I should return to Gilbert with all the seeds I've collected.}}
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Sylvia or Marsha after getting the last seed====
* '''Marsha:''' Thank you so much for what you did!
* '''Sylvia:''' Yes, thank you. It really meant so much!
* '''Player:''' Don't mention it. I'm always happy to help.
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Sylvia or Marsha after losing the seed====
* '''Marsha:''' Thank you so much for what you did!
* '''Sylvia:''' Yes, thank you. It really meant so much!
* '''Player:''' Don't mention it. Anyway, I was wondering if you had any more of those seeds?
* {{tcond|If the player has no inventory space:}}
** '''Sylvia:''' Of course! Just come back once you have room for one.
** {{tact|end}}
* '''Sylvia:''' Of course!
* {{tbox|pic=Quality violet tulip seed detail.png|You've been given a {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seed.}}
* '''Player:''' Thanks!
* {{tact|end}}

===If the player needs to talk to Alan or Oscar first===
====Talking to Alan or Oscar====
* '''Alan:''' What's taking them so long?
* '''Oscar:''' Go easy on them! It's not easy to do something like this, especially when they've been friends as long as they have.
* '''Alan:''' I know, I know. It's just all this waiting... It's making me nervous.
* '''Player:''' Hey there. I'm looking for someone who bought some {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seeds.
* '''Alan:''' Oh, that's us! Why do you ask?
* '''Player:''' The trader has run out and I could really use some. I'm hoping to use them to bring some more colour to Misthalin!
* '''Oscar:''' Well we definitely need more colour around here. Thing is, those seeds are quite important to us.
* '''Player:''' How so?
* '''Alan:''' See our two friends over there? They have just a little bit of a massive crush on each other. Problem is, neither of them are brave enough to ask the other out.
* '''Oscar:''' We thought some nice flowers might help things along a bit. They've both loved {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulips}} ever since they worked a stint on the same farm together.
* '''Oscar:''' We got them the seeds so that they could plant them together, thinking maybe the shared activity would nudge them into taking the first step!
* '''Alan:''' Thing is, it's hard to tell if it's working so far. They've been awkwardly standing there for quite a while now.
* '''Oscar:''' To be fair, it was pretty awkward when you asked me out as well.
* '''Alan:''' Was it? I thought it went really well!
* '''Oscar:''' You got so nervous you slipped and fell in the Lum. Some random passerby had to fish you out again!
* '''Alan:''' Oh yeah! That was a good day.
* '''Oscar:''' You know, speaking of random passersby, that gives me an idea. Considering we haven't had much luck helping our friends find some courage, perhaps you could try?
* '''Alan:''' Good idea! We'll give you one of these seeds in return of course.
* '''Player:''' But I'm just a stranger to them. What makes you think I can help?
* '''Oscar:''' Don't underestimate how meaningful a kind act from a random stranger can be.
* '''Player:''' Alright, I'll give it a go.
* '''Alan:''' Good luck!
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Alan or Oscar again====
* '''Oscar:''' Any luck?
* '''Player:''' Not yet.
* '''Alan:''' Please hurry! The suspense is killing me!
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Sylvia or Marsha====
* '''Sylvia:''' So... the... er... flowers?
* '''Marsha:''' Yeah... I like the... colour?
* {{tbox|The two of them awkwardly stand in silence.}}
* '''Player:''' Sometimes it's hard to know what to say, right?
* '''Marsha:''' Oh... who are you?
* '''Player:''' Just a friend.
* '''Sylvia:''' But we've never met you before.
* '''Player:''' Well then I guess that makes me your newest friend!
* '''Marsha:''' Okay...
* '''Player:''' It seems you both have something you want to say to the other, but neither of you knows how to say it.
* '''Sylvia:''' It's just finding the right words... It's... hard.
* '''Player:''' Let's be honest, I think you both know how the other feels already, so maybe the words don't matter.
* '''Marsha:''' What do you mean?
* '''Player:''' There are no right words for something like this! It's always going to be awkward, so embrace that awkwardness!
* '''Marsha:''' Huh... I suppose you're right.
* '''Sylvia:''' Then I guess we just... give things a go?
* '''Marsha:''' Yeah! Let's do it!
* '''Player:''' I think my work here is done. I'll leave you both to it.
* '''Sylvia:''' Thanks for the advice!
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Sylvia or Marsha again====
* '''Sylvia:''' Hey!
* '''Marsha:''' Thank you so much for helping us.
* '''Player:''' It's not a problem.
* '''Sylvia:''' See you around.
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Alan or Oscar after talking to Marsha and Sylvia====
* '''Oscar:''' You're back!
* '''Alan:''' Well?
* '''Player:''' I think it's good news for your friends.
* '''Oscar:''' Yay! I knew they could do it!
* '''Alan:''' Thank you so much. This world needs a few more people like you.
* '''Player:''' It was nothing. I'm just happy to have helped.
* {{tcond|If the player does not have inventory space:}}
** '''Alan:''' As promised, I have your {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seed. Just come back once you have room for it.
** {{tact|end}}
* '''Alan:''' As promised, here's your {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seed.
* {{tbox|pic=Quality violet tulip seed detail.png|You've been given a {{colour|#9240db|Quality Violet Tulip}} seed.}}
* '''Player:''' Thanks!
* {{mes|color=#9240db|I should return to Gilbert with all the seeds I've collected.}}
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Alan or Oscar after getting the last seed====
* '''Oscar:''' Thank you so much for what you did!
* '''Alan:''' Yes, thank you. It really meant so much!
* '''Player:''' Don't mention it. I'm always happy to help.
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Alan or Oscar after losing the seed====

===Talking to Wolf after getting the last seed===

* '''Wolf:''' Hey there, [player name].

* '''Wolf:''' I'm still selling my flowers and seeds! Did you find your last seed?

==Finishing up==
===Talking to Gilbert===
* '''Player:''' Hello, Gilbert!
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Player:''' I've found all five seeds!
* '''Gilbert:''' Really? That's great! Just one thing left then, time to cast the spell!
* '''Gilbert:''' Will you hand me the seeds?
* '''Player:''' Of course, here you go.
* {{tcond|If the player does not have all 5 seeds in the inventory:}}
** '''Player:''' Oh, opps{{sic|oops}}, I seem to have misplaced some of the seeds.
** '''Gilbert:''' Maybe the person who gave you them will have some replacements.
** '''Player:''' I will go and find out, back soon.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tbox|pic=Gorgeous orange lily seed detail.png|pic2=Tenacious indigo iris seed detail.png|You hand Gilbert all five seeds.}}
* '''Gilbert:''' Thank you! Okay, now, time for the spell. It should be quite the spectacle, are you ready to watch?
* '''Player:''' I'm excited, let's do this!
* {{qact|A cutscene starts, where Gilbert prepares to cast the spell.}}
* '''Gilbert:''' So, time for some of that magic!
* '''Gilbert:''' Here we go...
* '''Gilbert:''' {{overhead|Red for LIFE!}}
* '''Gilbert:''' {{overhead|Orange for HEALING!}}
* '''Gilbert:''' {{overhead|Yellow for SUNLIGHT!}}
* '''Gilbert:''' {{overhead|Green for NATURE!}}
* '''Gilbert:''' {{overhead|Blue for SERENITY!}}
* '''Gilbert:''' {{overhead|Purple for SPIRIT!}}
* {{qact|The flowers are dyed with each line Gilbert chants, and the cutscene ends.}}
* '''Player:''' That was amazing!
* '''Gilbert:''' It was, wasn't it? Everything is so beautiful!
* '''Gilbert:''' So much colour!
* '''Player:''' Do you think the others will like this?
* '''Gilbert:''' I'm sure they will, it brings more colour to Misthalin, just like we wanted!
* '''Gilbert:''' ...and it doesn't clash, like painting the roads would have.
* '''Gilbert:''' ...and it won't scare the sheep, like dyeing the tree's leaves would have.
* '''Gilbert:''' ...and it won't ruin the flavour of the cook's baking, like painting the wheat would have.
* '''Gilbert:''' So everything considered, it's the perfect solution!
* '''Player:''' Oh, wow! Look at that!
* '''Gilbert:''' Look at what?
* '''Player:''' Your flower crown, it's not grey anymore!
* '''Gilbert:''' You're right! The spell must have affected that too. Makes sense I suppose, since they're all the same flowers.
* '''Gilbert:''' I wasn't sure how to repay you for your help, but I made a lot of these flower crowns while waiting here earlier.
* '''Gilbert:''' They were a bit dull when grey, but now they're all colourful... maybe you'd like one as a thankyou?
* '''Player:''' That would be lovely!
* '''Gilbert:''' Here it is, well deserved! I've thrown in a few extras for you too as an extra thanks.
* {{tact|If the player does not have enough inventory space:}}
** '''Gilbert:''' Oh no, you need some more space before I can give you your rewards! You need [1-3] more [space/spaces].
** '''Player:''' I'll free up some space then. I'll be back in a second.
** {{tact|end}}
* '''Gilbert:''' Thanks again, the meadow looks lovely! Happy Pride!
* '''Player:''' Happy Pride!
* {{mes|You've completed the {{Colour|#e11a1a|20}}{{Colour|#ff5f00|22}} {{Colour|#edf419|PR}}{{Colour|#208542|ID}}{{Colour|#3a06b3|E E}}{{Colour|#9240db|VE}}{{Colour|#e11a1a|NT}}! Happy Pride!}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Gilbert before finishing the cutscene===

* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!

===Talking to Gilbert after completing the event===
* '''Player:''' Hello, Gilbert!
* '''Gilbert:''' Hi, [player name]!
* '''Player:''' The meadow is still looking lovely!
* '''Gilbert:''' It is, isn't it? Who would have known that a small sunburst of colour could bring so much joy to Misthalin.
* '''Player:''' I think you did, deep down!
* '''Gilbert:''' I had an inkling, but I wasnt sure. I'm glad it worked out.
* '''Player:''' What will you do now?
* '''Gilbert:''' I'll probably stick around here and make some more of these flower crowns.
* '''Gilbert:''' I can hand them out to any passing adventurers to help spread the colour around some more!
* '''Player:''' That's a nice idea. I'll see you around!
* '''Gilbert:''' See you!
* {{tact|end}}
